embeds.title: Morimens | The Greatest Gacha Game You've Never Played (Long Review)
embeds.description: My newest fascination for the last month has got to be one of the most unique gacha games I've seen. Morimens is what I'd describe as "Slay the Spire but gacha game". Despite sounding generic, it has absolutely engrossed me in every aspect. In this long gacha review, let me tell you why Morimens is

let me explain the terminology a bit. you get the base unit, then 3 "enlighten" levels, then a counter starts that goes from +1 to +12. once you're at +12, if you get another dupe, it's converted into a currency that can be used to increase the level cap of units at max level. so the highest any unit can be is +12, or 16 total copies. when you use the reset token on someone, it removes them back down to just the base copy iirc, and all dupes get converted into the tokens. this reset currency is not farmable, but every now and then, they give you a couple of them for an event or something like that
